hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm [-]rf /|rm [-]rf ~|git push [-][-]force|git push [-]f |git reset [-][-]hard|drop table|drop database|truncate table)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Destructive command. Double-check what you intend."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CONTENT" ] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(s[k]-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|A[K]I[A][A-Z0-9]{16}|[g]h[p]_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|[g]h[o]_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|x[o]x[b]-[a-zA-Z0-9]+|s[u]pabase_service_role_key|S[U]PABASE_SERVICE_KEY=|O[P]ENAI_API_KEY=|A[N]THROPIC_API_KEY=|S[T]RIPE_SECRET|-----BEGIN[^-]*PRIVATE KEY-----)'; then FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '(\.env\.example|\.env\.template|CLAUDE\.md|settings\.json|README\.md)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Looks like a real API key. Use a .env file."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo none); REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo none); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"EO STUDENT SESSION — Branch: $BRANCH | Remote: $REMOTE | Workflow in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Hooks: destructive-blocker, secret-scanner. 5-question scorecard before every PR (90+ to ship).\"}}"
